notes: Calmer floor + difficulty-scaled visual chaos. Floor waveform: rows 11→6, amp 36→24, scroll slower, less eye-strain. Every arena visual now scales with difficulty: Easy (0.5×) is clean — 4 rows, no bass shockwaves, half phrase lasers, pulse rings every 4 bars. Normal (1.0×) baseline. Hard (1.4×) +50% density. Brutal (1.8×) full chaos — 10 rows, fast scroll, max trap density, bigger shockwaves. Pick your difficulty to pick your visual intensity.
